title: Roegneria hackeliana
taxonomy: Roegneria hackeliana is a species of bamboo. It belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. Within the family Poaceae, Roegneria hackeliana is classified under the subfamily Bambusoideae, which comprises the bamboo genus. This species is further classified under the tribe Arundinarieae, a group of temperate woody bamboos. Roegneria hackeliana is also known by its synonym, Fargesia rufa.
